nasb.text: (but if a man does not know how to manage his own household, how will he take care of the church of God?),

esv.text: for if someone does not know how to manage his own household, how will he care for God’s church?

ccb.text: 一个人要是不懂得管理自己的家，又怎能照顾上帝的教会呢？

csbs.text: 但如果有人不知道怎么带领自己的家，他怎么能照顾神的教会呢？
